title: I Am Patrick: The Patron Saint of Ireland
original_title: I Am Patrick: The Patron Saint of Ireland
overview: I AM PATRICK peels back centuries of legend and myth to tell the true story of Saint Patrick. Through historical re-enactments, expert interviews and Patrick's own writings, experience the journey from man to saint.
